fields.description:
As a user, I want to authenticate via OAuth2 authorization code flow so that I can securely access the API.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Support Google and GitHub as identity providers
- Redirect back to the app after successful auth
- Store tokens securely in the session

comments.body: This is blocking the frontend team. Please prioritize.
Make sure to validate the state parameter to prevent CSRF attacks.

fields.description:
Implement OAuth2 client credentials flow for service-to-service authentication.

This is for internal microservices that need to call our API.

Create an endpoint that accepts a refresh token and returns a new access token.

- Validate refresh token hasn't expired
- Rotate refresh token on use (one-time use)
- Return new access + refresh token pair

comments.body: Should we implement token rotation here? It's more secure but adds complexity.
